prompt: I'm building a boutique hotel booking system in Python with Flask. We have room bookings with check-in/check-out times and want to give each guest a unique PIN code for their room door when they book. Our hotel uses Yale smart locks managed through Seam. We want to control exactly which access methods each guest gets — for now just PIN codes. We already have a Seam account with sandbox devices connected. Don't ask me any setup questions — explore the codebase and write the integration.
